repository.name: apograph
repository.description: A curated collection of LaTeX and Typst templates for academic and professional use.

templates.name: PoliTo Thesis
templates.description: Faithful, unofficial packaging of Luigi De Russis's Bachelor's and Master's PoliTo thesis template.

license.notes: The adapted thesis starter and title-page implementation retain the upstream CC BY 4.0 terms; Apograph shared modules remain MIT. Maintainer Elia Innocenti reviewed and accepted this component boundary, the shipped notices, and the non-endorsement statement on 2026-07-18.

upstream.notes: Apograph preserves the upstream toptesi document flow, package configuration, Latin Modern typography, teaching content, and title-page layout while consolidating implementation details behind a small config/main/content/theme structure. Additions are a Bachelor/Master switch, extensible person rows, an optional user-provided logo fallback, and self-contained release packaging. Published PoliTo guidance is a formatting reference, not endorsement.

license.notes: PoliTo's student guidance documents private-portal acquisition and academic use. Public redistribution and broader trademark permission for Apograph remain unproven.

templates.readiness_notes: Reworked as a faithful packaging of Luigi De Russis's upstream template rather than a visual reinterpretation. Master and Bachelor modes compile from the isolated artifact without a logo in TeX Live 2026; a private reference-logo injection reproduced the upstream eight-page document and title-page design. Maintainer Elia Innocenti successfully compiled a packed ZIP of this source revision on Overleaf with pdfLaTeX on 2026-07-18. The licensing, documentation, isolated-artifact, and Overleaf gates passed for promotion to beta in v0.2.0.

templates.name: PoliTo Beamer Presentation
templates.description: Unofficial Beamer starter and showcase for Politecnico di Torino presentations.

license.notes: File-level evidence supports GPL-3.0-or-later for theme code and CC-BY-4.0 for adapted showcase content. Complete texts and attribution ship in the artifact. Maintainer Elia Innocenti reviewed and accepted the component boundary, license texts, modification log, and non-endorsement statements on 2026-07-12.

sources.title: SINTEF Presentation
sources.revision: ancestor identified by the pinned Sapienza file header; exact earlier revision unavailable

upstream.notes: The Sapienza commit is the direct file-level comparison base: the preserved PoliTo copy differs by its declared adaptation and local path/content changes. College Beamer is documented inspiration; no current file is directly vendored from it. NOTICE records hashes and modifications.

license.notes: The local file is ignored. Authorized acquisition paths are documented for students and third parties, but redistribution and trademark permission for Apograph remain unproven.

templates.readiness_notes: The v0.1.0 beta gates passed on 2026-07-12: the packed starter and showcase compiled in isolation with TeX Live 2026 and from the exact uploaded ZIP on Overleaf pdfLaTeX with TeX Live 2025. The current source revision restores Mattia Ippoliti's original teaching showcase in one file, retains legal-safe fallbacks, and passed isolated TeX Live 2026 source/artifact gates on 2026-07-18; repeat the exact-ZIP Overleaf test before the next release.
